name: ayr-monorepo
description: A&R — dividend portfolio + analysis. Frontend (Vite + React) + Cloudflare Worker.

scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && npm run upload:sourcemaps && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=ayr --branch=production --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:safe: npm run audit:check && npm run test && npm run build && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:safe:force: ALLOW_REGRESSION=1 npm run audit:check && npm run build && npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:frontend
